dialogos.texto_en: So, this is Shureimon!\nWow, it's the real deal!
I know that feeling.\nBut, well, it IS the real deal.
I can't believe we're here.
Right?
I heard that 'Shurei'\nmeans to observe etiquette and manners.
It's displayed on the gate.\nIt means that Ryukyu is a region\nthat values etiquette and manners.
Wow, as expected of Uesugi-san.
But let's put aside the difficult topics.\nWe should start taking some pictures instead!
It's not that difficult!\nLet's absorb some knowledge while we're here!
Everyone, line up please.
H-Hey...\nNo one's listening...
Futaro-kun, are you still in tutor mode?\nThis is our graduation trip,\nforget about studying and have some fun.
Ichika...
(Nino...and Miku are taking a picture together.\n Okay, now's my chance!)
Hey, I have something I want to ask.
Huh? What is it?
What kind of guy is Nino into?
Huh?
I'm trying to find out what kind of guy Nino likes.
Wha? Why are you asking that now?\nYou're DATING Nino, you know?
I know!\nWell, she confessed to me,\nso I never really thought about it...
Well, if I have to answer,\nit would be you, since Nino confessed to you.
No, I mean other guys besides me.\nI'm asking about, how, well, Nino...
Yeah, I guess I know what you mean.
Hmm...\nMaybe she likes mischievous guys?
Mischievous guys, huh?
In other words, the opposite of you, Futaro-kun.
Ugh...
But don't worry about it.\nNino likes you, Futaro-kun.
(That's true, but...)
Futaro? What are you talking about with Ichika?
N-nothing in particular!
Mmm...
Well, whatever. Hey, let's take a picture together.
Y-yeah, let's do it!
Hmm...
It's huge! Impressive!\nIt looks like as if there's a final boss inside!
I don't know about a...final boss,\nbut this is Zuisenmon.\nZuisen means 'auspicious spring.'
A spring? But it's a gate.
Over there is spring water.\nThat's how it got its name.
Oh, I see.\nAnd there's water coming out of a dragon sculpture.
Yes, that's a dragon spout.\nIt's a sculpture from about 500 years ago.
(Nino is talking to Itsuki and the others.\n Good...)
Miku.\nCan I talk to you for a second?
What?
Do you know what type of person Nino likes?
...What do you mean?
If you know, I'd like you to tell me.
Why? You're already dating Nino, Futaro.
That may be true,\nbut I'd kind of like to hear an objective opinion.
Did something happen between you and Nino?
That's not really it...
Are you worried?
AH?!
Teehee, am I right?
...How did you come up with that?
People will try to become someone else, to be liked by \nthe person they are interested in.
I totally get that too.
...Is that so?
The type Nino prefers...
It might be someone\nwho has a strong sense of integrity.
Also, I think she likes guys\nwho are a little bit mischievous.\nMany of the actors she likes fit into that category.
...I see.\nThanks a lot, Miku.
You're welcome.\nDo your best, Futaro.
Ah! I recognize this building too!\nBut it's even more beautiful in real life!
This is the main hall.\nIt's where the king worked\nand where ceremonies were held.
This area in front of the hall is called the 'una.'\nThe central path is called the 'ukimichi' and only a limited\nnumber of people, like the king, were allowed to pass.
Huh?!\nIs it okay for me to stand here?
Teehee, it's fine now.
You sure are knowledgeable about this place.
Of course, I looked it up!
Wow, it's so luxurious and beautiful!\nI'm going to take a closer look.
I'll take some pictures too.
(Oh, Itsuki is alone.\n In that case...)
Itsuki.\nCan I talk to you for a moment?
Sure, what is it?
Can you tell me the type of guy Nino prefers?
Have you talked about that topic with\nMiku and Ichika earlier...?
You noticed?
I had a feeling you were acting a bit strange,\nbut what's the matter?
Ooh, well...
Assuming you're okay with my personal opinion,\nI can tell you what her type is.
O-okay!\nPlease, tell me.
Let me see...\nshe seems to like slightly delinquent guys.
Delinquent guys...
She doesn't like someone who is violent,\nshe is more into someone who has a tough exterior but a\nkind heart, something along those lines.
However, this is just based on the characters\nshe likes in movies and such,\nso I'm not sure how helpful that is.
No, that's very helpful. Thank you.
...Even so, it's surprising\nthat you're asking me this, Uesugi-kun.
Yeah, even Ichika and Miku were surprised.
Um, Uesugi-kun.\nAbout yesterday%p-2;――
Futaro! Let's take a picture together!
WH-WHAT?!
Huh? What's wrong?
I-it's nothing...\nItsuki, if you don't mind,\nwould you take the picture for us?
N-not at all!\nWhere shall we take it?
What are you two up to?\nYou're so flustered.
Nah, not at all.\nRight, Itsuki?
Yeah, everything is fine!
Mmm...
This view is amazing!\nYou can see the entire city from here!
This is Iri-no Azana.\nWe arrived here at noon, but apparently\nthe night view is also spectacular.
I'd love to see Iri-no Azana during night too.
Look, there's an island beyond the sea.
The sign over there says\nthose are the Kerama Islands,\nwhich are visible from here.
(Everyone is so caught up in the view.\n Now is my chance to ask Yotsuba...)
Hey Yotsuba, can I talk to you for a bit?
Yes? What is it?
Do you happen to know what kind of person Nino likes?
Huh? Nino's type?
I mean, I know it's a little late.\nBut, I think, well...\nit's something I should know.
Well, now that I think about it,\nI think her type is definitely you, Uesugi-san, right?
No, um, it's not that...
Hmm.\nI'm not sure, but maybe you have your own reasons\nfor asking this question, Uesugi-san?
Well, I guess.\nI wouldn't just up and do this.
Understood! In that case, I won't hesitate to cooperate.
Nino's type is someone\nwho's a little bit of a bad boy, I think.
Something in the lines of 'I'm going to do things my way\nno matter what you say'!
That kind of guy who says that.\nDo you get it?
Yeah, I kind of get it.\nYou mean she likes guys\nwho are a little bit rebellious, right?
Yeah, that's it!\nYou really understand things quickly!
(Ichika, Miku, and Itsuki all said something similar.\n There's no doubt that Nino's type\n is a bit of a bad boy.)
(However...)
(There's no way I can become a bad boy now,\n and if I try to act like one,\n I'll just expose myself.)
Um, it's true that Nino\nseems to like that kind of person, but%p-2;――
Well, for now, I don't doubt that Uesugi-san\nis the best for her.
O-of course.\nI don't doubt that.
It's just that...
AH!!\nPerhaps%p-2;――
Wh-what?
You're planning to become even more lovey-dovey with Nino, \naren't you?
Wha...?
Teehee, since we're in Okinawa.\nWhy not just propose right now?
He-hey, aren't you getting a bit too excited?\nI have different plans right now...
Huh? You have?\nYou don't want to be lovey-dovey with her?
Your facial expressions are giving it away!
...Quiet.
But I don't think you need to force yourself\nto become a bad boy, you know?
For example, just by taking the lead a little bit,\nthe impression you give can change significantly.
Is that how it is?\nI was just actually thinking about taking the lead...
What's wrong?\nWhat are you talking about?
Now I wonder,\nif you are talking about the type of guy Nino likes?
Huh? Are you talking about that now, big bro?
Even Raiha...\nHum, well, actually...
Oh, but it's important, you know.\nYou have to be a reliable boyfriend to Nino-san.
It's a miracle that such a wonderful person like her\nbecame your girlfriend.
(That's so true...)
So, have you come to a conclusion?
Well, let's see.\nI know that she likes guys\nwho are a little bit of a jerk...
It's the opposite of you, big bro...
But, right now, you're the number one, Uesugi-san!
Alright already! I get it!\nYou don't have to cheer me up so fiercely!
I'm wondering what Nino's favorite Uesugi-san\ncan do to make the relationship more lovey-dovey%p-2;――%p;?
I told him that by\ntaking the lead a little bit,\nhis impression on Nino can change quite a lot.
Taking the lead... Now that you mention it,\nI remember that girls in dramas\nenjoy being forced into things.
I wonder if she really likes being pulled along\nby someone who's assertive?\nBut there are people like that, right?
I see...
(So my idea of taking the lead\n wasn't necessarily wrong, then.)
(If that's the case,\n then all that's left is to put it into practice!)
...By the way, what do you mean by\n'there are people like that,' Raiha?\nD-don't tell me you've met someone like that...
Big bro...\nDon't worry about me,\nand focus on your own love life.
